# About
DevForge is a web development agency based in Norway. We build modern websites, e-commerce solutions, and web applications for businesses.

# Services
- Websites & Landing Pages: Modern, responsive websites from $1,500
- E-Commerce: Full-featured online stores from $3,000
- Web Applications: Custom dashboards and apps from $5,000
- SEO & Performance: Technical SEO and speed optimization from $800
- Maintenance & Support: Ongoing updates from $250/mo
